title: I want to save the data at that point in time in a fixed cycle
excerpt:

posts.author: Sosuke (Sosuke Takagi)
posts.cookedHtml:
For example, I would like to keep the data on the board at that point each Sunday so that in the future I can compare and view them.
It is desirable to have the point in time data stored automatically for the purpose of managing deviations between the original schedule and the present.
I have tried to achieve this using automation but have not found anything good, does anyone have any ideas?

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sosuke
If i got you right, I suggest you to try Time in Status app which track time the Item has spent in each workflow status. So you can monitor how fast the Item moves between statuses.
You’ll get user-friendly data on the board in a few seconds.

Знімок екрана 2024-01-26 о 03.33.481920×488 50.2 KB

Also you will be able to track how much time your issue spends in each status and much more by generating 3 types of reports:

  • Time in Status Report
  • Status Count Report
  • Transition Count Report

And use charts to visualize your reports a sample of a certain number according to time range/item range, or a single item:

  • Pie Charts
  • Bar Charts
  • Area Charts

The app is also available in the format of board integration.

Знімок екрана 2024-01-26 о 03.35.011538×634 95.8 KB

You can try it on the Monday Marketplace and share your experience with us.
Hope you find this app helpful.

posts.author: MistyMK (AppBay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sosuke ,

Advanced reporting board is now available for time trackers using Smart Timer and Team Tracking app which has the same look and feel as the native monday.com timer.

We had the same pain point with our service based business, detailed reporting is so important, so we got our dev to build a solution which we have now released to the monday.com marketplace.

We also built in the ability for the team to see LIVE who is recording time on what, this helps us to manage our remote team and re-delegate work as needed.

We have only recently launched so if there are any tweaks that would help it better suit your business feel free to add to the live chat and we will see if we can roll it out in the next update.
